# About AnythingLLM

[AnythingLLM](https://anythingllm.com/) is an open-source, all-in-one AI application
from Mintplex Labs that turns any document into context for a chat model. It
provides workspace-scoped Retrieval-Augmented Generation with citations, supports
30+ LLM providers, includes a built-in vector database (LanceDB), and runs locally
in Docker for full data privacy.

This skill pairs AnythingLLM with [Ollama](https://ollama.com/) so the entire stack
— LLM, embeddings, vector store, and UI — runs on-device with no external API
dependencies during inference.

- AnythingLLM source: <https://github.com/Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm> (MIT)
- Ollama source: <https://github.com/ollama/ollama> (MIT)
